findings.description: The source documents option0 through option9 attributes for the message tag embedding feature. The code example in s4 uses both option0 and option1, but hints only lists `option0`. Attributes option1 through option9 are missing from hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP example: `<n:message messageId="M7770008" option0="${title}" option1="${appName}" />` and comment: `option0～option9属性に指定する`
